headline: 5 Dividend Stocks Are 60% of Berkshire Hathaway After Buffett’s Q4 Selling Spree
summary: If any investor has stood the test of time, it’s Warren Buffett, and with good reason. For 60 years, the “Oracle of Omaha” had a rock-star-like presence in the investing world, and his annual Berkshire Hathaway shareholders meeting drew thousands of loyal investors.
